sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Spin Device / Gravity Reversal
special_mechanics.description: A spin device that turns the player upside down and reverses gravity, allowing novel traversal mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Zipper Warping
special_mechanics.description: The ability to warp throughout the current level via a zipper entrance

special_mechanics.name: Block Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Players can pick up and throw blocks at enemies

special_mechanics.name: Boat Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: A boat that can be both ridden and carried by the player

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. No precise movement parameters, gravity values, or jump physics documented in available sources. Game described as having 'innovative game physics' but specific numerical values are not provided. Sources focus on level design, plot, and special mechanics rather than technical movement parameters.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - M.C. Kids article
